name: Jacob Blount
title: Attending Physician
bio: Jacob has always had a passion for the mountains and snow sports. After completing medical school, he moved to Colorado for his residency and worked as a hospitalist before beginning his fellowship. During his residency, Colorado quickly became his second home, inspiring him to return after completing his fellowship. Outside of work, Jacob loves attending dog-friendly events around Denver and enjoys spending time in the mountains, whether hiking, skiing, camping, or biking.
education: University of South Florida Morsani College of Medicine, Tampa, FL
residency: University of Colorado Anschutz Medical Campus, Aurora, CO
fellowship: Pulmonary and Critical Care Medicine, University of California-Davis, Sacramento, CA
